metadata.description: Linux administrator username for SSH access.
SSH public key used to sign in to the VM.
VM size for the personal deployment.
Managed data disk size in GiB for /data.
Region used for Azure resources created by this template. Defaults to southeastasia and is independent from the resource group location.
Optional custom hostname. If empty, Azure-generated public DNS is used.
Optional Azure OpenAI resource endpoint, for example https://myresource.openai.azure.com.
Optional Azure OpenAI deployment name used by OpenClaw as the primary model ref.
Optional API key for the Azure OpenAI resource.
Optional Feishu App ID for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Feishu App Secret for WebSocket bot integration.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App ID. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.
Optional Microsoft Teams Bot App Password. Fill in both Teams fields together, or leave both empty. Azure Global only.

variables.msteamsWebhookUrl: [if(empty(parameters('hostname')), format('https://{0}{1}', variables('publicFqdn'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')), format('https://{0}{1}', parameters('hostname'), variables('msteamsWebhookPath')))]
variables.azureOpenAiValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment')), empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiEndpoint'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiDeployment'))), not(empty(parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey')))), 'enabled', string(int('azureOpenAi parameters azureOpenAiEndpoint, azureOpenAiDeployment, and azureOpenAiApiKey must either all be provided or all be empty.'))))]
variables.feishuValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('feishuAppId')), empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('feishuAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('feishuAppSecret')))), 'enabled', string(int('feishu parameters feishuAppId and feishuAppSecret must either both be provided or both be empty.'))))]
variables.msteamsValidationMode: [if(and(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId')), empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), 'disabled', if(and(not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppId'))), not(empty(parameters('msteamsAppPassword'))), not(variables('isAzureChinaCloud'))), 'enabled', string(int('Microsoft Teams standard mode requires both msteamsAppId and msteamsAppPassword, and is supported only in Azure Global.'))))]
variables.bootstrapScript:
[format('#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euxo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
cloud-init status --wait || true
while fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock >/dev/null 2>&1 || fuser /var/lib/dpkg/lock-frontend >/dev/null 2>&1 || fuser /var/lib/apt/lists/lock >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; done
apt-get update
apt-get install -y ca-certificates curl git gnupg caddy
install -d -o root -g {5} -m 0750 /etc/openclaw
TOKEN=$(head -c 24 /dev/urandom | base64 | tr -d ''\n'' | tr ''/+'' ''_-'')
cat > /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env <<EOF
HOME=/home/{5}
OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5}
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT={0}
OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN=$TOKEN
OPENCLAW_PUBLIC_URL={4}
OPENAI_API_KEY={1}
FEISHU_APP_ID={6}
FEISHU_APP_SECRET={7}
MSTEAMS_APP_ID={8}
MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD={9}
MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID={10}
EOF
chown root:{5} /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
chmod 640 /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
cat > /etc/profile.d/openclaw.sh <<''EOF''
if [ "$(id -un)" = "{5}" ] && [ -r /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env ]; then
  set -a
  . /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  set +a
fi
EOF
chmod 644 /etc/profile.d/openclaw.sh
cat > /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh <<''EOF''
if [ -r /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env ]; then
  set -a
  . /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  set +a
fi
EOF
chown {5}:{5} /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh
chmod 600 /home/{5}/.openclaw-env.sh
grep -qxF "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" /home/{5}/.profile || echo "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" >> /home/{5}/.profile
grep -qxF "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" /home/{5}/.bashrc || echo "[ -f ~/.openclaw-env.sh ] && . ~/.openclaw-env.sh" >> /home/{5}/.bashrc
cat > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-browser-url <<''EOF''
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sudo sh -lc ''. /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env && printf "Dashboard URL: %s#token=%s\n" "$OPENCLAW_PUBLIC_URL" "$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN"''
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/openclaw-browser-url
cat > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-browser <<''EOF''
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sudo sh -lc ''. /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env && exec sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN="$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN" OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY" FEISHU_APP_ID="$FEISHU_APP_ID" FEISHU_APP_SECRET="$FEISHU_APP_SECRET" MSTEAMS_APP_ID="$MSTEAMS_APP_ID" MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD="$MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD" MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID="$MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID" /usr/local/bin/openclaw devices approve --latest''
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-browser
cat > /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-teams-pairing <<''EOF''
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

pairing_code=""
if [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; then
  pairing_code="$1"
fi

sudo bash -lc ''
set -euo pipefail
. /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env

code="$1"
if [ -z "$code" ]; then
  if ! command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "python3 is required when pairing code is not passed explicitly." >&2
    exit 1
  fi

  pairing_json=$(sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN="$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN" OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY" FEISHU_APP_ID="$FEISHU_APP_ID" FEISHU_APP_SECRET="$FEISHU_APP_SECRET" MSTEAMS_APP_ID="$MSTEAMS_APP_ID" MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD="$MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD" MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID="$MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID" /usr/local/bin/openclaw pairing list msteams --json)
  code=$(printf "%s" "$pairing_json" | python3 -c "import json, sys; text = sys.stdin.read(); start = text.find(chr(123)); sys.exit(2) if start < 0 else None; requests = sorted((json.loads(text[start:]).get(\"requests\") or []), key=lambda item: str(item.get(\"createdAt\") or \"\")); latest = requests[-1] if requests else None; sys.exit(2) if not latest or not latest.get(\"code\") else sys.stdout.write(str(latest[\"code\"]))")
  status=$?

  if [ "$status" -eq 2 ]; then
    echo "No pending Teams pairing requests. Send a DM to the bot first, or pass the pairing code explicitly." >&2
    exit 0
  fi
fi

exec sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN="$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN" OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY" FEISHU_APP_ID="$FEISHU_APP_ID" FEISHU_APP_SECRET="$FEISHU_APP_SECRET" MSTEAMS_APP_ID="$MSTEAMS_APP_ID" MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD="$MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD" MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID="$MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID" /usr/local/bin/openclaw pairing approve msteams "$code" --notify
'' _ "$pairing_code"
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/openclaw-approve-teams-pairing
DATA_DEVICE=/dev/disk/azure/scsi1/lun0
mkdir -p /data /data/workspace
if [ -b "$DATA_DEVICE" ]; then
  if ! blkid "$DATA_DEVICE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    mkfs.ext4 -F "$DATA_DEVICE"
  fi
  uuid=$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DATA_DEVICE")
  if ! grep -q "$uuid" /etc/fstab; then
    echo "UUID=$uuid /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
  fi
  mount -a
fi
install -d -o {5} -g {5} /home/{5} /data /data/workspace
if [ -L /home/{5}/.openclaw ]; then
  :
elif [ ! -e /home/{5}/.openclaw ]; then
  ln -s /data /home/{5}/.openclaw
elif [ -d /home/{5}/.openclaw ] && [ -z "$(ls -A /home/{5}/.openclaw 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
  rmdir /home/{5}/.openclaw
  ln -s /data /home/{5}/.openclaw
fi
export HOME=/root
git config --global --add url."https://github.com/".insteadOf ssh://git@github.com/
git config --global --add url."https://github.com/".insteadOf git@github.com:
install -d -m 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/gpgkey/nodesource-repo.gpg.key | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg
echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.gpg] https://deb.nodesource.com/node_24.x nodistro main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nodesource.list
apt-get update
apt-get install -y nodejs
npm install -g openclaw@latest
OPENCLAW_BIN="$(command -v openclaw || true)"
if [ -z "$OPENCLAW_BIN" ]; then
  echo "Global openclaw binary was not found after npm install" >&2
  exit 1
fi
if [ "$OPENCLAW_BIN" != "/usr/local/bin/openclaw" ]; then
  ln -sf "$OPENCLAW_BIN" /usr/local/bin/openclaw
fi
if [ -n "{8}" ]; then
  set -a
  . /etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
  set +a
  sudo -u {5} env HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/{5} OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/data OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/data/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN="$OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN" OPENAI_API_KEY="$OPENAI_API_KEY" FEISHU_APP_ID="$FEISHU_APP_ID" FEISHU_APP_SECRET="$FEISHU_APP_SECRET" MSTEAMS_APP_ID="$MSTEAMS_APP_ID" MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD="$MSTEAMS_APP_PASSWORD" MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID="$MSTEAMS_TENANT_ID" /usr/local/bin/openclaw plugins install @openclaw/msteams
fi
printf ''%s'' ''{2}'' | base64 -d > /data/openclaw.json
printf ''%s'' ''{3}'' | base64 -d > /etc/caddy/Caddyfile
chown {5}:{5} /data/openclaw.json
chown -R {5}:{5} /data /home/{5}
cat > /etc/systemd/system/openclaw-gateway.service <<''EOF''
[Unit]
Description=OpenClaw Gateway
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User={5}
Group={5}
EnvironmentFile=/etc/openclaw/openclaw.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/openclaw gateway --bind loopback --port {0}
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
WorkingDirectory=/data

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
systemctl daemon-reload
systemctl enable openclaw-gateway caddy
systemctl restart openclaw-gateway
systemctl restart caddy
', string(variables('openclawPort')), parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'), variables('openclawConfigBase64'), variables('caddyConfigBase64'), variables('publicControlUrl'), parameters('adminUsername'), parameters('feishuAppId'), parameters('feishuAppSecret'), parameters('msteamsAppId'), parameters('msteamsAppPassword'), variables('msteamsTenantId'))]
